app.name: Orbit
app.stack_note: Next.js App Router; Tailwind CSS; theme via CSS custom properties on <body>

scale_patterns.section_label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide or tracking-wider text-[var(--color-accent)]
scale_patterns.mono: font-mono (e.g. technical strings in share cards)

canvas.description: Warm off-white page background (Cozy Garden); used on main layouts

text.description: Deep forest green for primary body and headings

neutral.gray_400: Tailwind gray-400 — placeholders, muted secondary text, some icons
neutral.gray_200: Tailwind gray-200 — borders on white variant inputs
neutral.black_usage: Primary text uses #1A3021, not pure black

semantic.destructive_hover: red-400 — delete profile link hover, trash emphasis

css_custom_properties.description: Set on <body> from palette (server + ThemeProvider). All components use var(--color-*).

variables.name: --color-primary
variables.role: Main brand color — primary buttons, active tab fill, avatar fills, focus rings, links

variables.name: --color-primary-dark
variables.role: Darker shade for hover states on primary-tinted elements

variables.name: --color-primary-light
variables.role: Very light tint — tab rail backgrounds, input backgrounds (colored variant), dividers, skeletons

variables.name: --color-accent
variables.role: Secondary text, labels, category lines, search icon, italic hints, tag text

css_custom_properties.defaults_in_globals_css: Sage palette values in frontend/styles/globals.css :root; overridden at runtime

layout.breakpoint_focus: Single-column mobile-first; dashboard uses max-w-md mx-auto

account.main: min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-[#FDFBF7] p-6

profile_detail.padding: Typically px-6; consistent horizontal gutter with dashboard

routes./: Landing — name, tagline, Try now → /dashboard, Sign up → /account?mode=signup

shell.root_layout: html lang=en; body wraps StoreProvider → ThemeProvider → children
shell.data: DataStore abstraction — localStorage when logged out, Supabase when authenticated

variants.colored: bg-[var(--color-primary-light)], text-[#1A3021], placeholder:text-[var(--color-accent)], focus ring accent
variants.white: bg-white, border border-gray-200, same text/placeholder, focus ring gray-200 — search bars, add-profile on neutral ground

sliding_pill_tabs.description: Track: bg-[var(--color-primary-light)] rounded-full p-1; sliding thumb: absolute rounded-full bg-[var(--color-primary)] with width calc(50% - 4px), left 4px or 50%; labels z-10; active text-white, inactive text-[var(--color-primary)]; transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out

buttons.primary_cta: bg-[var(--color-primary)] text-white font-semibold rounded-full py-2.5 or py-3 text-sm hover:opacity-90
buttons.icon_circle: w-8 h-9 h-9 variants — rounded-full bg-[var(--color-primary-light)] text-[var(--color-primary)] hover:opacity-80

avatars.fill: Initials on bg-[var(--color-primary)] text-white or skeleton bg-[var(--color-primary-light)]

lists.profile_cards: Swipeable row: outer rounded-3xl shadow-sm; delete zone red background revealed on swipe

focus.rings: focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--color-primary)] or variant-specific (gray-200 on white inputs)

fields.label: Hobbies
fields.value: Rock climbing, photography, cooking Thai food

sample_profile_detail_mock.note: Illustrative content for design tools; actual UI uses Notes/Add tabs and dynamic data.
